compiled_state.title: Update debug-everything SKILL.md for worktree isolation dispatch
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Modify debug-everything SKILL.md to reference shared worktree-dispatch.md at its sub-agent dispatch point. Add isolation:worktree conditionally based on config.

Note: debug-everything reads fix-bug SKILL.md inline — ensure the inline execution path also applies worktree isolation when dispatching fix tasks.

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md (EDIT — safeguard file, authorized by story scope)

### TDD Requirement
RED eval from task T6 must turn GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Debug-everything eval passes
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references worktree-dispatch.md
  Verify: grep -q 'worktree-dispatch' plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Eval run - 4/5 tests pass (1 pre-existing failure: INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED test, same failure before my changes). Worktree isolation tests (2 new) pass. Acceptance criteria met.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fixed: Debug-everything SKILL.md updated for worktree isolation. 4/5 evals pass (1 pre-existing).
comments.author: Test
